note: NOMINAL contemporaneous price. INTC had NO stock split in this window, so the cumulative split factor for any split AFTER as_of is 1 -> nominal = Yahoo raw_close(last <= as_of) x 1 = $21.48. Because the raw close excludes Yahoo's dividend back-adjustment, it reconciles directly to the nominal card price (and the dividend was suspended the prior day, so post-as_of dividend drift is nil anyway). Independent corroboration NOT from the Yahoo feed: (a) stockanalysis.com daily history reads the same $21.48 close (and $29.05 prior-day 2024-08-01), and (b) card market cap $91.9B / 4,276M shares = $21.49/sh. THE 52WK LOW IS THE AS-OF DAY ITSELF: 2024-08-02 was a -26% crash to the lowest level in over a decade (intraday low $20.42), so the entry sits ~+5% off the trailing 52wk low BY DESIGN (deliberate falling-knife test). As of as_of the dividend SUSPENSION (announced with Q2'24 results on 2024-08-01, effective Q4'24) was already public; the announcement date 2024-08-01 is <= as_of 2024-08-02. No post-as_of information (no later price/recovery, no CHIPS stake, no leadership change) is used.

live_fields.low_high_hug_reason: Crash-day entry BY DESIGN: 2024-08-02 was a -26.1% one-day repricing to the lowest level in over a decade (the as-of day set the trailing low itself, intraday $20.42). The close $21.48 sitting ~+5.2% off the 52wk low ($20.42) and -58% below the 52wk high ($51.28) is the intended falling-knife / structural_decline_trap test, not a low-grab error -- the value is the genuine as-of close, corroborated by stockanalysis.com and the card market-cap identity.

sources.note: raw close 21.48 x split factor 1 (no INTC split after as_of); validator backtest-mode refetched_yahoo = 21.48

share basis behind the card's ~$91.9B equity value (Q2'24 10-Q, S006)

live_fields.value: As of 2024-08-02: Intel SUSPENDED its quarterly dividend, announced with Q2'24 results on 2024-08-01 (effective Q4 2024) specifically to preserve liquidity for the fab buildout; a final ~$0.125/share payment was set for Sep-1-2024 to holders of record Aug-7. The thesis treats the suspension as an as-of fact (a cash-strain signal). The suspension announcement (2024-08-01) is <= as_of (2024-08-02) -- NO lookahead. (Context: the dividend had already been cut 65% in Feb-2023, also pre-as_of.)

sources.note: Q2'24 8-K/earnings release announces the dividend suspension + $10B cost plan + headcount/capex cuts
independent dated confirmation (Fortune): Intel suspends dividend, slashes jobs

live_fields.value: Q3'24 outlook: guided to a Q3 GAAP loss of $(0.24)/share (non-GAAP ~breakeven); >15% headcount reduction, >20% gross-capex cut, dividend suspended -- the as-of forward frame. No usable trailing/forward GAAP earnings multiple (GAAP loss-making).

sources.note: Q3'24 guide + cost/capex/headcount actions in the Q2'24 8-K/earnings release
